<!-- What changes, and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The full gate chain passes locally (see CONTRIBUTING.md): ruff format/check, basedpyright, pyright, pyrefly, pytest
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Zero new suppressions (`# type: ignore`, `# noqa`, pyright directives)
- [ ] README / `config_sample.yml` updated if the change is user-facing
